Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Demand For Inspection Of Documents; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Spencer J. Pahlke, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Ardemis Assadourian

NO other APPEARANCE stated. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Ardemis Assadourian and Romeo Piro's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents as to defendant Genesis Genetics Institute LLC is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $715 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
